notes:
Same scraping pipeline as Oscars but applied to television. Smaller liquidity per
category but fewer professional handicappers; the edge thesis is even stronger.

sources_error.polymarket_contracts:
not_implemented: adapter 'Polymarket' is not implemented yet.
  Source role: Polymarket on-chain market history via the Polymarket CLOB API + Subgraph (https://docs.polymarket.com).
  Implement quant/adapters/polymarket.py with class signature `fetch(market, source_params) -> DataFrame`.
sources_error.news_scraper:
not_implemented: adapter 'News scraper' is not implemented yet.
  Source role: generic article scraper used by agent orchestration (Claude/Codex). source_params['urls'] or ['queries']. Outputs (timestamp, text, source_url) rows.
  Implement quant/adapters/news scraper.py with class signature `fetch(market, source_params) -> DataFrame`.
